title: bidens crocea
intro: Bidens crocea, also known as the Yellow Beggarticks, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant's health benefits include treating various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations, as well as being used as a diuretic and to support digestive health. Bidens crocea can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and flowers can also be used fresh or dried in herbal remedies.
